parameters.functionCode:
const body = items[0].json;
const props = body.properties || [];

const normalized = props
  .filter(p => p.latitude && p.longitude && p.address)
  .map(p => ({
    source:           p.source || 'dallas_cad',
    external_id:      p.external_id || `cad_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`,
    address:          (p.address || '').trim(),
    neighborhood:     p.neighborhood || 'Dallas',
    zip:              p.zip || null,
    latitude:         parseFloat(p.latitude),
    longitude:        parseFloat(p.longitude),
    property_type:    p.property_type || 'Office',
    sqft:             p.sqft             ? parseInt(p.sqft)            : null,
    lot_size_sqft:    p.lot_size_sqft    ? parseInt(p.lot_size_sqft)   : null,
    year_built:       p.year_built       ? parseInt(p.year_built)      : null,
    occupancy_status: p.occupancy_status || 'Occupied',
    list_price:       p.list_price       ? parseInt(p.list_price)      : null,
    predicted_value:  p.predicted_value  ? parseInt(p.predicted_value) : null,
    monthly_rent:     p.monthly_rent     ? parseInt(p.monthly_rent)    : null,
    price_per_sqft:   p.price_per_sqft   ? parseInt(p.price_per_sqft)  : null,
    cap_rate:         p.cap_rate         ? parseFloat(p.cap_rate)       : null,
    days_on_market:   p.days_on_market   ? parseInt(p.days_on_market)  : null,
    tier:             p.tier || 'standard',
    raw_data:         p.raw_data || {},
  }));

console.log(`Normalized ${normalized.length} properties`);
return [{ json: { properties: normalized, count: normalized.length } }];
